nasb.text: It came about when Abram came into Egypt, the Egyptians saw that the woman was very beautiful.

esv.text: When Abram entered Egypt, the Egyptians saw that the woman was very beautiful.

cnv.text: 果然，亞伯蘭進入埃及的時候，埃及人就注視那女人，因為她十分美麗。

ccb.text: 亚伯兰一行到了埃及，撒莱的美貌引起了埃及人的注意。

csbs.text: 果然，当亚伯兰进入埃及时，埃及人看到那女人极其美丽。
